techniques.name: Prompt caching
techniques.summary: Cache stable, reused content (system prompt, tool defs, long docs). Cache reads cost ~10% of normal input — up to 90% off the reused portion.

techniques.name: Context editing
techniques.summary: Auto-clear stale tool results as context fills. Anthropic's own 100-turn benchmark: 84% token savings with better task performance.

techniques.name: Trim the system prompt
techniques.summary: A bloated system prompt is re-sent on every call. Trimming it compounds across the whole session.

techniques.name: Stop re-reading the same file
techniques.summary: Re-reading a file already in context is double-paying. Common and expensive in coding workflows.

techniques.name: Concise output / length cap
techniques.summary: Ask for concise output or set max_tokens. Output costs ~5x input, so each trimmed output token punches above its weight.

techniques.name: Model tiering
techniques.summary: Route simple work (classify, extract, format) to a cheaper/faster model; reserve the frontier model for hard reasoning.

techniques.name: Batch API
techniques.summary: 50% off across models for non-urgent work, and it stacks with caching — combined savings can exceed 95%.
